events.title: Cubbon Park Morning Walk
events.description: Join us for a guided walk through Cubbon Park exploring heritage trees, colonial architecture, and green spaces. Open to all ages.
events.venue: Cubbon Park Main Gate, MG Road

events.title: ORR Cycling Rally
events.description: A community cycling rally along the Outer Ring Road to advocate for dedicated cycle lanes. Helmets mandatory.

events.title: Jayanagar Heritage Walk
events.description: Discover the rich history of Jayanagar through its streets, parks, and local landmarks. A 5km leisurely walk.

events.title: World Bicycle Day Community Ride
events.description: Celebrate World Bicycle Day with a fun community ride across the city. Refreshments provided at the finish line.

events.title: Street Audit & Walkability Workshop
events.description: Learn how to conduct street audits and assess walkability in your neighbourhood. Hands-on workshop with WRI India experts.
events.venue: WRI India Office, Vittal Mallya Road

events.title: Lalbagh Botanical Garden Walk
events.description: An early morning nature walk through Lalbagh, guided by a botanist. Learn about the diverse flora and the garden's 250-year history.
